Amended Ntc Of Mtn & Mtn Of Deft To Enforce Settlement
Off Calendar Jan-08-2003 Continued To Jan-30-03 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 301
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
Maura M. Walsh, Esq. of GROTEFELD & DENENBERG 344-9676, for plaintiff and opposing party Dept. of Transportation of the State of Illinois (also appearing for line 1 - #317891)
No other appearance on this matter. Tentative Ruling was: DEFENDANT GEORGE WILLIAM WOLFF's Motion To Enforce Settlement -- Continued to January 9, 2003 on Court's own motion. Counsel respresented to the Court of her unavailability on 1/9. The Court ordered the parties to find a mutually agreeable date and notify the Court this afternoon of the continued hearing date. Off the record counsel informed the Court of the continued hearing date: January 30, 2003. (JJM/301/CW-X) Reporter: Eric Throne, CSR #7855
